creator: petr@petrovich.kiev.ua
text:
Update ports/devel/kdesvn to 0.14.4 and kdesvn will now build against actual verion of subversion 1.5
	Fix master sites.
	
	Please, close ports/121119

Fix: PORTNAME=      kdesvn
-PORTVERSION=   0.14.1
-PORTREVISION=  3
+PORTVERSION=   0.14.4
 CATEGORIES=    devel kde
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.alwins-world.de/programs/download/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION:R}.x/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://kdesvn.alwins-world.de/trac.fcgi/downloads/

 MAINTAINER=    yuanjue@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       KDE frontend for Subversion
